item.title: Life under a Delhi flyover: how one homeless family endures the city’s...
item.description: Life under a Delhi flyover: how one homeless family endures the city’s extreme heat  The GuardianDelhi Heat Wave Explained: Causes Behind Rising Temperatures  The Sunday GuardianCoal, Concrete, And The Dying Himalaya: Why Delhi Is Burning  The Friday TimesDelhiwale: City in heatwave, citizen outdoors  Hindustan TimesThe plains of Delhi are on fire, literally  Down To Earth
